name: agency_model_first_save_truth

hypothesis_checked.H1: Confirmed: handleAddModel previously set anyPhotosUploaded from upload count without validating upsertPhotosForModel return or DB rows.
hypothesis_checked.H2: Partially: onRefresh + getModelByIdFromSupabase already ran; gap was success messaging and rebuild when upsert returned empty.
hypothesis_checked.H3: Addressed: persistenceSuffix + stricter portfolio/polaroid flags prevent silent 'full success' when DB verify fails.

confirmed_root_causes: upsertPhotosForModel return value and DB read-back were not validated before rebuild and success copy
rebuildPortfolio/rebuildPolaroid ran for any anyPhotosUploaded even when upsert failed
upsertModelLocation failure on add was console-only; save flow was console-only for location
safe_hardening_applied: After upsertPhotosForModel: verify inserted.length vs expected AND getPhotosForModel count >= expected before setting portfolioPersisted/polaroidPersisted
Rebuild mirrors only for types with verified persistence
Alert on upsertModelLocation failure in add and save flows (uiCopy)
addModelPersistenceWarningSuffix appended to add-model feedback when location or photo DB persistence incomplete
New uiCopy keys under modelMedia for photo/location persist failures and suffix
deferred_product_decisions: Consolidating to a single 'current location' field vs models.city + model_locations.agency — not in this incident
Whether step3Succeeded should flip false when only location row fails (profile RPC already succeeded) — kept success with explicit Alert

regressions_checked.lint: pass (0 errors, 4 pre-existing warnings in other files)
